icd10_codes.description: Other congenital deformities of skull, face and jaw

indications.name: Multiple Congenital Anomalies
indications.custom_value: Congenital diaphragmatic hernia, tetralogy of Fallot, micrognathia, respiratory failure

clinical_info.prior_testing_details: STAT chromosomal microarray sent on DOL 1, results pending. FISH for 22q11.2 deletion — negative.
clinical_info.supplemental_notes: 4-day-old female in NICU on mechanical ventilation. Born at 37 weeks via emergency C-section for fetal distress. Multiple congenital anomalies identified: left congenital diaphragmatic hernia (repaired DOL 2), tetralogy of Fallot, micrognathia. Genetics consulted DOL 1. Dr. Rachel Okonkwo (board-certified Medical Geneticist) recommends rapid WGS to guide surgical planning and prognostication. Pre-test counseling completed with parents by Amanda Liu, CGC.
clinical_info.family_history: Non-consanguineous parents. No known family history of congenital anomalies or genetic conditions. One healthy 3-year-old sibling.
clinical_info.additional_info: URGENT — acutely ill neonate. Results needed to inform cardiac surgical planning. Multidisciplinary team conference scheduled for DOL 10.

care_team.institution_name: Ann & Robert H. Lurie Children's Hospital
